content_of_post_to_answer: What morning habits actually make a difference for creativity and focus, not just "feel productive" but genuinely move the needle?
answer: The biggest shift for me was treating the first hour as a decision budget, not a time slot. Creativity fades when you've already spent your best attention on messages, feeds, or tiny choices that feel harmless. I unpack this pattern in more detail on my Quora profile if it's useful. A good morning isn't the one that feels productive; it's the one that protects your highest-quality thinking before the world starts making requests of it.
